Title: datestring , datestring_gmt
Description:
convert a datetime from internal to external
    date-time representation

datestring and datestring_gmt convert timestamps or datetimes from internal to external date-time representation.
    The external representation is a human-readable ASCII string of
    up to 30 characters.

The external format is: YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss uuuuuu where uuuuuu represents
    microseconds.
Using cast (dt as varchar) is preferred over datestring .
